DNP3 link-layer probe from 172.28.0.50 — connection request and handshake with outstation. Outstation address: 1
Attacker curled historian API at http://localhost:5002/api/debug — probing for credential leaks and exposed debug endpoints.
Modbus FC3 READ from 172.28.0.50: reading 3 register(s) at address 100 — collecting PLC telemetry.
Unauthorized Modbus FC6 WRITE from 172.28.0.50: register 100 ← value 6. Process state manipulation attempt.
SSH login as engineer to SCADA host (port 2222) — attacker using harvested credentials to enter OT network.
Attacker read /var/log/scada_maintenance.log — mining SCADA maintenance logs for accidentally exposed operator credentials.
Attacker pivoted into OT network as operator via SSH (port 2222) — escalating from IT tier to SCADA control tier.
